description: Create PR, Issue, Review, and Branch Protection services in apps/quantmail/backend/services/ with full CRUD and merge operations
steps: Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/pr.service.ts - PullRequestService class with: createPR(input), listPRs(repoId, filters), getPR(repoId, number), mergePR(repoId, number, strategy: squash|rebase|merge), closePR(repoId, number), getDiff(repoId, number). Use Zod schemas for inputs. Constructor takes PrismaClient.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/review.service.ts - ReviewService class with: submitReview(prId, reviewerId, status, body), addComment(prId, authorId, filePath, line, body), requestChanges(prId, reviewerId, body), listReviews(prId). Constructor takes PrismaClient.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/issue.service.ts - IssueService class with: createIssue(input), listIssues(repoId, filters), getIssue(repoId, number), labelIssue(repoId, number, labels), assignIssue(repoId, number, assignees), closeIssue(repoId, number), reopenIssue(repoId, number). Constructor takes PrismaClient.

Create apps/quantmail/backend/services/branch-protection.service.ts - BranchProtectionService class with: createRule(repoId, branchPattern, requiredApprovals, requireStatusChecks), updateRule(ruleId, updates), deleteRule(ruleId), listRules(repoId), enforceOnPush(repoId, branch, prId) - checks approvals and status checks. Constructor takes PrismaClient.

Create test files: apps/quantmail/backend/__tests__/pr.service.test.ts, review.service.test.ts, issue.service.test.ts, branch-protection.service.test.ts. Each test file creates mock PrismaClient and tests all service methods with realistic scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: PullRequestService supports create, list, get, merge (3 strategies), close, and getDiff
ReviewService supports submit, addComment, requestChanges, listReviews
IssueService supports create, list, get, label, assign, close, reopen
BranchProtectionService CRUD and enforcement logic works correctly
All test files pass with meaningful test cases covering success and error paths
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run from repo root passes with new test files included
findings: All 47 new tests pass. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for commit hooks. Pre-existing shared-ui DOM failures (26 tests) remain but are unrelated. Commit body lines must be under 100 chars for commitlint.
